slides.headline: Streamline VA GIBill Certifications
slides.body: Automate, track, and support student veterans with our desktop tool.

slides.headline: Automate Certifications
slides.body: Our tool simplifies the certification process, reducing manual errors.

slides.headline: Track Compliance
slides.body: Easily monitor and maintain compliance with VA regulations.

slides.headline: Support Student Veterans
slides.body: Our tool offers resources and support for student veterans throughout their education.
bullets: One-stop solution for all veteran-related issues

slides.headline: Ensure Accuracy
slides.body: Minimize errors and ensure accurate certification information for your students.

slides.headline: Save Money
slides.body: Our pre-launch pricing offers significant savings for your institution.

slides.headline: Read the full post

outline.caption: Streamline VA GIBill certifications, track compliance, and support student veterans with our desktop tool. Future you, and your next audit, will thank you.

rubricBreakdown.critique: The weakest slide is Step 4 of 5, 'Ensure Accuracy,' as it could benefit from a more compelling headline to match the others.
